tools.description: Basic Vedic birth chart (Kundali) — Rasi (D1) + Navamsa (D9) + planet positions (sign, house, degree, retrograde, nakshatra+pada) + ascendant + whole-sign houses. Sidereal zodiac (Lahiri ayanamsha by default; Raman, Krishnamurti, true_chitra also accepted). No yoga ranking, no shadbala, no school-specific interpretation, no narrative. Free tier (60/hour, 500/day per IP). For the full Vedic computation suite — yogas, all 5 dasha systems, shadbala, school-specific interpretation, narrative analysis — use https://kundalimcp.com.

birth_datetime_local.description: Local clock time at the birth location, ISO 8601 naive form (e.g. '1990-04-15T08:30:00'). NO 'Z' suffix, NO ±HH:MM offset. Server resolves the historical UTC offset from latitude+longitude via IANA tzdata.

tools.name: compute_chart_basic

tools.description: Vimshottari Mahadasha timeline for a Vedic birth chart. Returns the lifetime dasha tree (MD by default; AD or PD via `depth`), starting balance, and Julian-Day boundaries for every period. Sidereal Lahiri zodiac. Free tier (60/hour, 500/day per IP). For Yogini, Ashtottari, Kalachakra, and Char dashas — and full school-specific dasha effects — use https://kundalimcp.com.
tools.name: vimshottari_dasha

tools.description: Vedic almanac (panchanga) for a date+location: tithi (lunar day with paksha), nakshatra (with pada), yoga, karana, vara (weekday). Sidereal Lahiri zodiac. Free tier (60/hour, 500/day per IP). For muhurtha verdicts, full classical favourability rules, and abhijit/brahma windows, use https://kundalimcp.com (`query_muhurtha`).
tools.name: panchanga

tools.description: Raw geocentric planetary positions at any UTC datetime — Sun, Moon, Mercury..Saturn + Rahu (TrueNode) + Ketu (Rahu+180°) by default. Sidereal (Lahiri default) or tropical zodiac. Returns longitude (deg), latitude (deg), distance (AU), longitude speed (deg/day), and retrograde flag. Free tier (60/hour, 500/day per IP). For chart computation, dashas, yogas, and the full Vedic suite, use https://kundalimcp.com.

bodies.description: Default: [Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu]

tools.name: ephemeris_positions
